type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Celanese reclaims unreacted VAM in its process.  Special grades of product require virgin VAM only. There was no capacity on site in 2011 to store the excess reclaim generated.  In 2012, the major part of special grade production was concentrated in the Q1 and Q2. By this way the reclaimed VA management was easier.
